scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend,kitchen -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w kitchen-dashboard"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w kitchen-dashboard
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w kitchen-dashboard
